requirements.summary: Create landing page structure with header, hero section, and main content area
acceptanceCriteria: Landing page displays with header navigation
Content area is present and properly styled

file_operations.description: Replace the default App component structure with a landing page layout that includes a header component, hero section with the generated background image (frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-background.dim_1920x1080.png), and main content area container for the about section

Create a header component that displays the Trouthstem logo (frontend/public/assets/generated/trouthstem-logo.dim_200x200.png) and navigation menu, positioned at the top of the page with proper spacing and alignment

Create a hero section component with the generated background image (frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-background.dim_1920x1080.png) as a background, includes heading text and visual prominence through sizing and positioning

requirements.summary: Implement modern design system with warm earth tones and clear typography hierarchy
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette uses warm earth tones consistently throughout the site
Typography hierarchy is clear with distinct heading and body text styles
Overall design feels modern and professional

file_operations.description: Define CSS custom properties for the warm earth tone color palette (terracotta, sage green, cream) in the root selector, establish typography hierarchy with clear font size and weight scales for headings and body text, and apply modern styling conventions

Extend the Tailwind configuration to include custom color tokens for the earth tone palette (terracotta, sage green, cream) and configure font family and size scales to support the typography hierarchy

requirements.summary: Create responsive navigation menu with section links
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation menu displays in the header
Navigation links are functional and navigate to appropriate sections
Menu is responsive and works on mobile devices

file_operations.description: Add navigation menu with anchor links to page sections (About), implement responsive behavior for mobile devices with appropriate breakpoints, ensure links scroll smoothly to target sections

acceptanceCriteria: About section is clearly visible on the landing page
Content provides introductory information about Trouthstem

file_operations.description: Create an About section component with introductory content about Trouthstem, properly formatted with headings and paragraph text following the typography hierarchy, with adequate spacing and readability
Import and render the About component in the main content area below the hero section, with appropriate section ID for navigation anchor linking
